description_long: This is a pair of modern slip-on sandals in a muted olive green color, featuring a minimalist, seamless design. The upper section is a single molded piece that covers the top of the foot, with a wide opening at the front for the toes and a slightly raised heel cup at the back. The sole is thick and contoured, providing cushioning and support, and is distinguished by a pronounced, jagged tread pattern for enhanced grip. The material appears to be a soft, flexible foam or rubber, offering comfort and shock absorption. There are no visible logos, laces, or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for casual, urban, or indoor-outdoor use.
description: A pair of olive green slip-on sandals with a thick, jagged sole and seamless, minimalist design. Made from soft, flexible foam or rubber for comfort and grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the thick, jagged sole and seamless upper.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open heel area and the contoured footbed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile and sole details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide toe opening and the smooth, uninterrupted upper surface.
